title: $newstruct
text: $newstruct Explicitly create a new Struct with no members. StructVar = $newstruct Example: vStruct1->mbr = $newstruct Parameters Table 1. Parameters Parameter Data Type Description StructVar struct Name of a variable or parameter; must be of type struct or any . Return Values Returns an empty Struct. Use Allowed in all component types. Description Structs are usually implicitly created by assigning a value to a struct variable or parameter. The $newstruct function enables you to explicitly create an empty Struct or Struct member, which you can then populate. Example: Using $newstruct The following statement inserts a reference to an empty Struct (referenced by vStruct1 ) called mbr . vStruct1->mbr = $newstruct Copy The following statement would rarely be required except, for example, if it were used in a loop that needs to reinitialize vStruct2 . vStruct2 = $newstruct Copy Was this topic helpful?
